_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: The Jaccard index, a measure of similarity, was calculated for all cell lines in a pairwise manner using the variants called with DeepVariant...The cell lines that are immortalized/primary pairs (Jaccard index ranging from 0.679 to 0.722) cluster together
details: Successfully used to calculate Jaccard indices showing immortalized cell lines had higher similarity to matched primary cultures than unrelated cultures (Jaccard index ranging from 0.679 to 0.722)
